summary: P3 Product Outcome Learning System testing complete. All 16 backend tests passed. Frontend testing verified all required features: Summary cards, Score comparison, Tabs, Update functionality, Auto-Label button.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/outcomes/track requires auth (returns 401/403)
Backend: POST /api/outcomes/track requires product_id (returns 400)
Backend: POST /api/outcomes/track returns 404 for non-existent product
Backend: POST /api/outcomes/track creates outcome with product_name, outcome_status='pending', metrics, launch_score_at_launch
Backend: POST /api/outcomes/track returns existing outcome if product already tracked (no duplicates)
Backend: GET /api/outcomes/my requires auth (returns 401/403)
Backend: GET /api/outcomes/my returns outcomes array and summary (total, success, moderate, failed, pending, total_revenue, total_orders, success_rate)
Backend: GET /api/outcomes/my?status=success filters by status correctly
Backend: PUT /api/outcomes/{id} requires auth (returns 401/403)
Backend: PUT /api/outcomes/{id} returns 404 for non-existent outcome
Backend: PUT /api/outcomes/{id} updates metrics (revenue, orders, ad_spend, days_active) and auto-computes ROI
Backend: POST /api/outcomes/auto-label requires auth (returns 401/403)
Backend: POST /api/outcomes/auto-label classifies pending outcomes based on thresholds
Backend: GET /api/outcomes/stats requires auth (returns 401/403)
Backend: GET /api/outcomes/stats returns total_tracked, success_rate, avg_roi, total_revenue, total_orders, avg_launch_score_success, avg_launch_score_failed, best_categories, insights
Backend: Complete workflow test (track → update → auto-label → stats)
Frontend: /outcomes page loads (data-testid='outcomes-page')
Frontend: Summary cards display (data-testid='outcomes-summary') with Tracked, Success Rate, Total Revenue, Total Orders
Frontend: Score comparison cards show avg_launch_score_success (data-testid='avg-score-success') and avg_launch_score_failed (data-testid='avg-score-failed')
Frontend: Learning Insights section displays (data-testid='outcome-insights')
Frontend: Tracked Products list with tabs (All, Pending, Success, Moderate, Failed) all functional
Frontend: Each outcome row has data-testid='outcome-{id}' format
Frontend: Update button on outcome row (data-testid='edit-outcome-{id}') opens edit form
Frontend: Edit form (data-testid='edit-form-{id}') contains revenue, orders, ad_spend, days_active inputs and Save button
Frontend: Auto-Label button (data-testid='auto-label-btn') triggers classification and shows toast
Frontend: Nav sidebar shows 'Outcomes' link with Target icon (data-testid='nav-outcomes')
seed_data_creation: Test data created during workflow test - 1 additional outcome tracked
context_for_next_testing_agent: P3 Outcome Learning System complete. Key endpoints: (1) POST /api/outcomes/track - tracks product launch, returns existing if duplicate. (2) GET /api/outcomes/my - returns outcomes with summary stats, supports ?status= filter. (3) PUT /api/outcomes/{id} - updates metrics, auto-computes ROI. (4) POST /api/outcomes/auto-label - classifies pending outcomes (success: orders>=50 OR revenue>=500, moderate: orders>=10 OR revenue>=100, failed: days>=30). (5) GET /api/outcomes/stats - aggregate stats with insights. Frontend route: /outcomes (OutcomesPage with summary cards, score comparison, insights, tabbed products list with inline edit). Test data: 3 outcomes exist for testref@test.com user (1 success, 2 moderate).

POST /api/outcomes/track.returns: outcome object with product_name, outcome_status='pending', metrics, launch_score_at_launch
POST /api/outcomes/track.duplicate_handling: Returns existing outcome with 'Already tracking' message

GET /api/outcomes/my.returns: { outcomes: [], summary: { total, success, moderate, failed, pending, total_revenue, total_orders, success_rate } }

GET /api/outcomes/stats.returns: { total_tracked, success_rate, avg_roi, total_revenue, total_orders, avg_launch_score_success, avg_launch_score_failed, best_categories, insights }

elements_verified.summary_cards: data-testid='outcomes-summary' (4 cards: Tracked, Success Rate, Total Revenue, Total Orders)
elements_verified.tabs: All, Pending, Success, Moderate, Failed (all functional)
elements_verified.edit_form: data-testid='edit-form-{id}' with revenue, orders, ad_spend, days_active inputs
